history.sync_failed: Failed to sync your account snippets

messages.id_conflict: This ID is already taken. Please try another one.

about_page.title: About
about_page.subtitle: A passion project built by two developers who believe in making code sharing simple and beautiful.
about_page.features_subtitle: Everything you need for seamless code sharing

syntax_highlighting.title: Syntax Highlighting
syntax_highlighting.desc: Beautiful code display with support for 15+ programming languages.

sharing.title: Easy Sharing
sharing.desc: Share your snippets effortlessly with a simple link or QR code.

drawing.title: Interactive Drawing
drawing.desc: Collaborative whiteboard to sketch ideas and diagrams alongside your code.

terminal_execution.title: Interactive Terminal
terminal_execution.desc: Run your code snippets (Bash, Python, Java, etc.) directly in the integrated high-performance terminal.

ai_edit_assistant.title: AI Edit Assistant
ai_edit_assistant.desc: Enhance your code, fix bugs, or explain logic using integrated AI assistant.

real_time_collaboration.title: Real-time Collaboration
real_time_collaboration.desc: Edit code and draw together in real-time with live cursors and presence.

file_share.title: File Sharing
file_share.desc: Upload and share files securely with a unique link.

redirect_urls.title: Shorten Links
redirect_urls.desc: Create short, manageable links that redirect to any destination instantly.

ai_detection.title: AI Language Detection
ai_detection.desc: Automatically detects programming languages using AI technology.

save_as_export.title: Flexible Export
save_as_export.desc: Download your snippets in multiple formats including PDF, Plain Text, or language-specific extensions.

expiration.title: Expiration Control
expiration.desc: Set snippets to expire after 1 hour to 1 year, choose a custom date, or keep them forever.

custom_ids.title: Custom URLs
custom_ids.desc: Create memorable, custom URLs for easy snippet sharing.

password.title: Enhanced Security
password.desc: Protect sensitive code with passwords and manage granular access permissions.

access_control.title: Role-Based Access Control
access_control.desc: Grant Viewer, Editor, or Admin roles to specific users for precise collaboration control.

profile.title: User Profiles
profile.desc: Create an account to manage, edit, and keep track of your snippets.

dark_mode.title: Dark Mode
dark_mode.desc: Easy on the eyes with a beautiful dark theme option.

multi_language.title: Multi-Language UI
multi_language.desc: Interface available in English, German, Hindi, Japanese, and Marathi.

labels.title: Smart Labels
labels.desc: Organize your snippets with a powerful, user-specific labeling system. Tag and categorize your code for instant retrieval and a personalized organization experience.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Snipit was born from a simple idea: code sharing should be beautiful, fast, and effortless. As developers, we found ourselves constantly sharing code snippets with colleagues, friends, and the community, but existing solutions felt clunky and outdated.
story.p2: So we decided to build something better. Snipit combines elegant design with powerful functionality, making it the perfect tool for developers who care about both form and function.
story.p3: Built with modern web technologies and a focus on user experience, Snipit aims to be the go-to platform for code sharing in the developer community.

contribute.title: Get in Touch
contribute.desc: We would love to hear from you! Whether you have questions, feedback, or just want to say hello, feel free to reach out to us through any of the channels below.

free.question: Is Snipit free to use?
free.answer: Yes! Snipit is completely free to use. You can use it for personal or commercial projects without any cost.

expiration.question: How long do snippets last?
expiration.answer: You can choose the expiration time for each snippet, ranging from 1 hour to 1 year. You can also create snippets that never expire.

secure.question: Is my code secure?
secure.answer: We take security seriously. All snippets are encrypted in transit and at rest. Password-protected snippets add an extra layer of security.

edit.question: Can I edit my snippets later?
edit.answer: Yes, if you are logged in when you create a snippet, you can edit or delete it later from your dashboard.

server_error.title: System Offline
server_error.subtitle: We're having trouble connecting to our core services. Our team has been notified and is working on a fix.

error_page.title: Page Not Found
error_page.subtitle: Oops! The snippet you're looking for doesn't exist or has expired.
error_page.description: It might have been deleted, the link could be incorrect, or the snippet may have reached its expiration date.

auth.login_subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your snippets.
auth.signup_subtitle: Create an account to start managing your snippets.
auth.logout_confirm_question: Are you sure you want to logout?

auth.forgot_password_success_subtitle: Check your email for the reset link
auth.forgot_password_success_message: We've sent a password reset link to
auth.forgot_password_success_check_inbox: Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.
auth.forgot_password_success_toast: Reset link sent to your email
auth.reset_password_min_length_toast: Password must be at least 6 characters

editor.ai_autocomplete_tooltip: Autocomplete suggestions as you type. Press Tab to accept.

ai_dialog.title: AI Editor Assistant
ai_dialog.description: Transform the selected text. Tell the AI what you want to do.
ai_dialog.placeholder: e.g. Make this more professional, or summarize into bullet points.
ai_dialog.error_failed: Failed to get a valid response from AI.
